retry_reason: kfree_skb always consumes the reference; no failure return exists, so retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper that unconditionally releases one reference on the given sk_buff by calling kfree_skb. After this call, the caller must not access the skb pointer. This function is typically invoked on error paths to discard the skb. The error message is a side effect and does not affect ownership or lifecycle.
